title: UN Comtrade API Response Envelope
description: Standard response envelope returned by all UN Comtrade API endpoints.

count.description: Number of records returned in this response

data.description: Array of result records; schema varies by endpoint

error.description: Error message if the request failed; null on success

validationStatus.description: Validation status message for the request parameters

countReleased.description: Total records available in the dataset for this query (may exceed count)
